dashboard.label: Data Quality — Log Source Entropy
dashboard.description: Monitor log source health by tracking punct pattern diversity. Low variety = potential stuck or degraded source. No TA dependency — works universally.

search.query: | tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy_proxy FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY sourcetype | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | stats count as affected_sources

| tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY sourcetype | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | stats sum(event_count) as total_events

| tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY sourcetype | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | sort - event_count | head 1 | fields sourcetype

| tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy_proxy count as event_count FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY index, sourcetype, _time span=1h | where entropy_proxy < $entropy_threshold$ | stats avg(entropy_proxy) as avg_entropy latest(entropy_proxy) as latest_entropy sum(event_count) as total_events BY index, sourcetype | eval avg_entropy=round(avg_entropy,1) | sort - total_events | rename index as Index sourcetype as Sourcetype avg_entropy as "Avg Distinct punct/hr" latest_entropy as "Latest Distinct punct" total_events as "Total Events"
| tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY sourcetype, _time span=1h | timechart span=1h avg(entropy) BY sourcetype limit=20 useother=false

panel.title: Entropy Heatmap — Sourcetype by Hour of Day

search.query: | tstats dc(Data_Quality.punct) as entropy FROM datamodel=Data_Quality.Events BY sourcetype, _time span=1h | eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H:00") | chart avg(entropy) BY sourcetype, hour
